title: chiococca pachyphylla
intro: Chiococca pachyphylla, also known as the False Jasmine or False Star Jasmine, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Chiococca pachyphylla include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and pneumonia, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Chiococca pachyphylla can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve for its medicinal uses, with its flowers and leaves being the primary sources of herbal preparations.
